title: Kengyilia alaica
taxonomy: Kengyilia alaica is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Kengyilia, which is a group of Asian grasses. The genus Kengyilia is part of the subfamily Pooideae, which includes over 1,000 species of grasses. The family Poaceae, also known as the grass family, is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous flowering plants. Kengyilia alaica is a specific example of this classification, found in certain regions.
